What’s an Online Order Aggregator? Here's why your restaurant needs one
Deliverect.summary_raw:
During a typical service, your kitchen might field orders from DoorDash, Uber Eats, Glovo, TakeAway, and several other sales channels. With orders coming from multiple sources, how can your staff keep all these orders straight and ensure that operations continue to run smoothly, especially during holidays and other peak times?  

That’s where order aggregators can help.

Deliverect.headline: How Integrated Online Ordering Software Can Improve Your Last-Mile Logistics
Deliverect.summary_raw: Food delivery services have steadily grown in popularity and necessity, with many restaurants rising to meet the demand. But as beneficial as delivery services can be, behind-the-scenes details like last-mile logistics can be expensive.

Deliverect.headline: We’re rocketing: 30M orders, 1B in GMV & $65 million in Series C funding!
Deliverect.summary_raw: We haven’t even reached our third birthday and we have already achieved so many exciting milestones. In April 2021 we reached 30 million orders processed across our 30 markets around the world, and we announced our latest round of funding from DST Global Partners and Redpoint Ventures totalling $65 million in Series C.
